headline: Goldman Sachs Lowers its Price Target on CoStar Group (CSGP) to $63
summary: CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:CSGP) is one of the 10 Beaten Down Stocks Insiders Are Piling Into. On March 19, 2026, Goldman Sachs analyst George Tong lowered the price target on CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:CSGP) to $63 from $73 and maintained a Buy rating. George Tong said traffic at Homes.com has moderated, with February uniques down […]
